title: Multicultural Commencement Celebration & Reception
description: CCA's graduating BIPOC students who identify as members of communities of color/ethnicities (Black/African, Native/Indigenous, LatinX, Asian, Middle Eastern, North African, Mixed or Multiracial people), and international students, reflect the diverse world in which we live, work, and grow. The Multicultural Commencement Celebration and Reception is an opportunity to acknowledge and honor the valuable insights, ideas, and experiences these students contribute to classrooms and communities across campus. This event is hosted by the Office of Student Belonging & Inclusion.
